title: Black Butler
sourceNotes: Original 2008 S1 anime (24 eps). Eps 1-15 faithfully adapt the first three manga arcs (~ch 1-25); eps 16-24 diverge into an anime-original ending. Black Butler II (S2, id 6707) is entirely anime-original. The 2014+ re-adaptations (Book of Circus, Book of Murder, Book of the Atlantic, Public School Arc) re-adapt later manga arcs faithfully under separate AniList IDs and would each warrant their own mapping. Manga ongoing (~220 chapters).

mappings.arc: Houndsworth (S1 diverges into anime-original ending at ep 16)
